summary: Iteration 2: tested IDR pricing + Indonesian checkout flow end-to-end. Added 5 backend tests for new order fields, IDR pricing snapshot, and promo logic (LOCKIN10, FOCUS20, invalid, empty). All 20 pytest cases pass. Full Playwright E2E covered landing IDR display, /checkout navigation, qty stepper min/max, subtotal IDR formatting, valid/invalid promo, empty-form validation, all 4 payment options, Shadcn province Select, order POST -> success page (order id + Rp 2.518.200 + shipping destination), and back-to-home navigation. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend pricing math (10%/20%) is duplicated in CheckoutPage.jsx and backend server.py. Consider exposing a /api/orders/calculate or returning promo metadata to keep a single source of truth and avoid drift.
Order success page shows truncated order id (slice 0,8). Make sure the full id is stored/returned; currently fine because backend returns the full uuid.
Payment is MOCKED (no gateway) - already documented; surface this clearly in success copy or admin so QA does not assume real settlement.
Province field is required client-side but backend marks it Optional. Either tighten backend Pydantic (require province for IDR orders) or relax client validation - keep consistent.
seed_data_creation: Pytest creates TEST_-prefixed newsletter/contact/order documents in MongoDB (kept; no cleanup endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend lives in /app/backend/server.py (single file). All new pricing/promo logic is in POST /api/orders. CheckoutPage uses Shadcn Select for province - use page.click('[data-testid="checkout-province"]') then page.get_by_role('option', name='...').click(force=True). qty stepper disables the min/max button (don't try to click past the limit; assert is_disabled() instead). Promo codes LOCKIN10 (10%) and FOCUS20 (20%) are normalized to upper-case. Payment is mocked - order just persists.
